message:
feat(api): register agent detection and search diagnostics endpoints

Register six new API endpoints in the schema registry with JSON schemas:

Agent inventory endpoints:
- robot agents list: filesystem-based installed agent inventory
- robot agents running: pane-inferred running agent inventory
- robot agents detect: on-demand detection with optional --refresh

Search diagnostics endpoints:
- robot search-explain: explain missing/incomplete search results
  with diagnostic codes, evidence, and confidence scores
- robot search-index stats: index health snapshot (count, segments,
  size, freshness, TTL, flush config)
- robot search-index reindex: batch rebuild accounting (submitted,
  accepted, skipped, deferred)

All schemas follow JSON Schema 2020-12 with detailed property
descriptions. Includes test validating nested robot command paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -302,6 +302,36 @@ impl SchemaRegistry {
                     stable: true,
                     since: "0.1.0".into(),
                 },
+                EndpointMeta {
+                    id: "agents_list".into(),
+                    title: "List Agents".into(),
+                    description: "List installed agents from filesystem detection".into(),
+                    robot_command: Some("robot agents list".into()),
+                    mcp_tool: None,
+                    schema_file: "wa-robot-agents-list.json".into(),
+                    stable: true,
+                    since: "0.1.0".into(),
+                },
+                EndpointMeta {
+                    id: "agents_running".into(),
+                    title: "List Running Agents".into(),
+                    description: "List running agents inferred from active panes".into(),
+                    robot_command: Some("robot agents running".into()),
+                    mcp_tool: None,
+                    schema_file: "wa-robot-agents-running.json".into(),
+                    stable: true,
+                    since: "0.1.0".into(),
+                },
+                EndpointMeta {
+                    id: "agents_detect".into(),
+                    title: "Detect Agents".into(),
+                    description: "Run installed-agent detection and return inventory".into(),
+                    robot_command: Some("robot agents detect".into()),
+                    mcp_tool: None,
+                    schema_file: "wa-robot-agents-detect.json".into(),
+                    stable: true,
+                    since: "0.1.0".into(),
+                },
                 EndpointMeta {
                     id: "workflow_run".into(),
                     title: "Run Workflow".into(),
@@ -976,6 +1006,9 @@ mod tests {
             "wa-robot-search-index-reindex.json",
             "wa-robot-events.json",
             "wa-robot-event-mutation.json",
+            "wa-robot-agents-list.json",
+            "wa-robot-agents-running.json",
+            "wa-robot-agents-detect.json",
             "wa-robot-workflow-run.json",
             "wa-robot-workflow-list.json",
             "wa-robot-workflow-status.json",
@@ -1054,6 +1087,33 @@ mod tests {
         );
     }
 
+    #[test]
+    fn agents_endpoints_use_nested_robot_command_paths() {
+        let reg = SchemaRegistry::canonical();
+
+        let agents_list = reg.get("agents_list").expect("agents_list endpoint exists");
+        assert_eq!(
+            agents_list.robot_command.as_deref(),
+            Some("robot agents list")
+        );
+
+        let agents_running = reg
+            .get("agents_running")
+            .expect("agents_running endpoint exists");
+        assert_eq!(
+            agents_running.robot_command.as_deref(),
+            Some("robot agents running")
+        );
+
+        let agents_detect = reg
+            .get("agents_detect")
+            .expect("agents_detect endpoint exists");
+        assert_eq!(
+            agents_detect.robot_command.as_deref(),
+            Some("robot agents detect")
+        );
+    }
+
     // --- ApiVersion parse edge cases ---
 
     #[test]

@@ -0,0 +1,130 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "$id": "https://wezterm-automata.dev/schemas/wa-robot-search-index-reindex.json",
+  "title": "WA Robot Search Index Reindex Response",
+  "description": "Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot search-index reindex'. Returns the batch, filter, and document-accounting summary for a forced search index rebuild.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "required": [
+    "batch_size",
+    "scanned_segments",
+    "submitted_docs",
+    "accepted_docs",
+    "skipped_empty_docs",
+    "skipped_duplicate_docs",
+    "skipped_cass_docs",
+    "skipped_resize_pause_docs",
+    "deferred_rate_limited_docs",
+    "flushed_docs",
+    "expired_docs",
+    "evicted_docs",
+    "pane_metadata_docs",
+    "flush_operations",
+    "final_document_count",
+    "final_index_size_bytes",
+    "source_counts"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "batch_size": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 1,
+      "description": "Batch size used while replaying capture history into the index"
+    },
+    "pane_filter": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "If set, only this pane was reindexed"
+    },
+    "since_filter": {
+      "type": ["integer", "null"],
+      "description": "If set, only segments captured at or after this timestamp (epoch ms) were considered"
+    },
+    "until_filter": {
+      "type": ["integer", "null"],
+      "description": "If set, only segments captured at or before this timestamp (epoch ms) were considered"
+    },
+    "scanned_segments": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Segments scanned from storage during reindex"
+    },
+    "submitted_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents submitted to the index writer"
+    },
+    "accepted_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Submitted documents accepted after dedupe/filtering"
+    },
+    "skipped_empty_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Segments skipped because they contained no indexable text"
+    },
+    "skipped_duplicate_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents skipped as duplicates of existing indexed content"
+    },
+    "skipped_cass_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents skipped because they belong to Cass capture data"
+    },
+    "skipped_resize_pause_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents skipped because they were classified as resize/pause noise"
+    },
+    "deferred_rate_limited_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents deferred because indexing rate limits were reached"
+    },
+    "flushed_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents flushed to disk during this run"
+    },
+    "expired_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents expired by retention cleanup during this run"
+    },
+    "evicted_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents evicted to satisfy index size limits"
+    },
+    "pane_metadata_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Metadata-only pane documents emitted during reindex"
+    },
+    "flush_operations": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Number of explicit writer flush operations performed"
+    },
+    "final_document_count": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Document count after the reindex completed"
+    },
+    "final_index_size_bytes": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Approximate on-disk index size after the run"
+    },
+    "source_counts": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "description": "Accepted document counts grouped by source type",
+      "additionalProperties": {
+        "type": "integer",
+        "minimum": 0
+      }
+    }
+  },
+  "additionalProperties": false
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "$id": "https://wezterm-automata.dev/schemas/wa-robot-search-index-stats.json",
+  "title": "WA Robot Search Index Stats Response",
+  "description": "Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot search-index stats'. Returns a health and freshness snapshot for the on-disk search index.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "required": [
+    "index_dir",
+    "state_path",
+    "format_version",
+    "document_count",
+    "segment_count",
+    "index_size_bytes",
+    "pending_docs",
+    "max_index_size_bytes",
+    "ttl_days",
+    "flush_interval_secs",
+    "flush_docs_threshold",
+    "source_counts",
+    "embedder_tiers_available",
+    "background_job_status",
+    "indexing_error_count"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "index_dir": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "description": "Filesystem path to the Tantivy index directory"
+    },
+    "state_path": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "description": "Filesystem path to the index state file"
+    },
+    "format_version": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Current on-disk index format version"
+    },
+    "document_count": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Number of searchable documents currently stored"
+    },
+    "segment_count": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Number of index segments currently present"
+    },
+    "index_size_bytes": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Approximate on-disk index size in bytes"
+    },
+    "pending_docs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Documents queued for the next flush"
+    },
+    "max_index_size_bytes": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Configured index size cap before eviction/cleanup"
+    },
+    "ttl_days": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Retention window applied to indexed content"
+    },
+    "flush_interval_secs": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Configured background flush interval"
+    },
+    "flush_docs_threshold": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Queued-document threshold that triggers a flush"
+    },
+    "newest_captured_at_ms": {
+      "type": ["integer", "null"],
+      "description": "Newest indexed capture timestamp (epoch ms)"
+    },
+    "oldest_captured_at_ms": {
+      "type": ["integer", "null"],
+      "description": "Oldest indexed capture timestamp (epoch ms)"
+    },
+    "freshness_age_ms": {
+      "type": ["integer", "null"],
+      "description": "Age of the newest indexed capture relative to now (ms)"
+    },
+    "last_update_ts": {
+      "type": ["integer", "null"],
+      "description": "Timestamp of the last successful index update (epoch ms)"
+    },
+    "source_counts": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "description": "Indexed document counts grouped by source type",
+      "additionalProperties": {
+        "type": "integer",
+        "minimum": 0
+      }
+    },
+    "embedder_tiers_available": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "description": "Embedding tiers currently available for semantic indexing",
+      "items": {
+        "type": "string"
+      }
+    },
+    "background_job_status": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "description": "Background indexing job state"
+    },
+    "indexing_error_count": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Count of recent indexing errors tracked in state"
+    },
+    "last_error": {
+      "type": ["string", "null"],
+      "description": "Most recent indexing error message, if recorded"
+    }
+  },
+  "additionalProperties": false
+}
